options.name: -trx
options.description: Path to the trx file from the dotnet test command.

options.name: -o
options.description:
Path to the output file of the .gurka file.
Default is the current directory

options.name: -f
options.description: Default is the Features directory in the current directory

options.name: -p
options.description:
Name of the project the result is created from
-a or --assembly <path>:                 Path to the test assembly file
